<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\VarDumper\Caster; /** * Represents an uninitialized property. * * @author Nicolas Grekas <p@tchwork.com> */ class UninitializedStub extends ConstStub { public function __construct(\ReflectionProperty $property) { parent::__construct('?'.($property->hasType() ? ' '.$property->getType() : ''), 'Uninitialized property'); } }
